channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: HTMX swapped 5 dev tools for me
item.description: Cut frontend bundle size 90% and AWS costs 50% with HTMX 2.0 — here’s the exact stack swap that worked in production in 2026.

item.title: AI agents lose context: 3 fixes for persistent memory
item.description: Persistent AI memory fails on restart — 3 fixes with Redis 7.2, PostgreSQL 15, and LangChain 0.2.0. Cut context loss to zero with volume mounts, circuit breakers, and shared stores.

item.title: Vibe code: works great, fails forever
item.description: Cut production outages 70% by avoiding these 7 vibe-coding shortcuts — connection pools, logging, and cache mistakes most teams repeat in 2026.

item.title: AI agent postmortem: human loop vs blind replay
item.description: AI agent postmortems: human-loop vs blind replay — 432 injected failures show which catches mistakes faster, cuts false positives 75%, and saves $38 per 1k incidents at scale

item.title: API attacks rising 40%: the 3 patterns to block now
item.description: API response times fell 56% after blocking 40% more attacks with idempotency keys and strict schema validation — real latency, cost, and code you can reuse

item.title: Cut cold starts 70%: Lambda cost hack
item.description: Cut cold starts 70% and save $1,200/month on AWS Lambda — idle timeout tuning, ARM64, and SnapStart steps that actually work in 2026.

item.title: AI glue code: 3 ways to avoid duct-taping models
item.description: Cut irrelevant AI answers 80% by fixing prompt drift, adapter decay, and cold starts — concrete costs, Lambda code, and rollback commands for Nairobi startups using Predibase and NVIDIA NIM in 2026.

item.title: Use feature flags to deploy AI models safely
item.description: Deploy AI models 80% faster with feature flags — canary splits, instant kill switches, and 5-minute rollbacks in 2026. FastAPI, Flagsmith 3.18, Prometheus 2.48.

item.title: Dumped Kubernetes for $200 and no one noticed
item.description: The bill hit $3,240 on the 2nd every month.

item.title: 6 AI tools that paid off for Nairobi teams in 2026
item.description: Cut dev time 38% with AI tools — Nairobi teams using GitHub Copilot 2026, Cursor IDE v0.28, and Sourcegraph Cody Pro hit London-level velocity at local infra cost in 2026.

item.title: TLS 1.3 breaks with post-quantum crypto — fix now
item.description: TLS handshake latency jumped 10× with post-quantum crypto — here’s how we fixed it, the real numbers, and the one sysctl change that mattered in 2026.

item.title: AI killed our dev tool sales until we fixed this
item.description: Turn AI skepticism into sales: how a Nigerian dev tool went from $2.8k to $6.3k MRR by selling compliance artifacts, not CLIs. SARIF, offline-first retries, and the real buyer in 2026.

item.title: Islands beat SPAs in 2026
item.description: Cut web vitals 58% by switching to Astro 4.8 islands in 2026 — payloads down 90%, TTI from 5.8 s to 1.2 s, infra bill unchanged.

item.title: Service mesh is a tax you can skip
item.description: Cut 22% cloud costs and 60% incident time by ditching service mesh in production — real Istio, Cilium, and Linkerd benchmarks from 2026 systems with code and costs.

item.title: AI changed my workflow. 3 old rules I dropped
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with Redis caching — connection pooling, eviction policies, and the cache stampede mistake most teams make.

item.title: Stop async Python from burning your production
item.description: Async Python in 2026: 33% lower cost per million requests with asyncio than threads — but only if you fix these 3 timeout traps and connection leaks.

item.title: API abuse 2026: 5 attacks we missed until costs spiked
item.description: Cut API abuse costs 42% with tiered defenses: Redis 7.2 sliding windows, JWT kid swap blocking, and GraphQL depth limits — real numbers from a 2026 production system.

item.title: Ask for 20% more in 2026
item.description: Get 10-15% more salary in 2026 — AI code tools cut routine work, benchmark the overhead, and counter with hard numbers from your repo

item.title: AI scanners miss real flaws — here’s how to use them
item.description: Cut AI scanner noise 42% by pairing deterministic and AI tools — real benchmarks, false positive rates, and a 30-minute fix for your semgrep.yml file in 2026.

item.title: Nairobi SaaS stack 2026: real costs exposed
item.description: Cut Nairobi SaaS costs 42% with a concrete bill of materials — Fly Machines, Crunchy Bridge, Redis 7.2, and Backblaze B2 with real latency and spend numbers for 2026.
